description: Case-to-knowledge reuse and closure prep: Juniper EX4300 Variant 19

arguments.short_description: Internal escalation for CS-0000029 on Juniper EX4300 Variant 19
arguments.description: Customer escalation from CS-0000029 for Juniper EX4300 Variant 19.

arguments.short_description: Containment plan for CS-0000029 on Juniper EX4300 Variant 19
arguments.description: Prepare a safe workaround or rollback for the customer issue in CS-0000029.
arguments.implementation_plan: Document the workaround and escalation path for Juniper EX4300 Variant 19.
arguments.testing_plan: Validate customer symptom relief and rollback safety for CS-0000029.

body.data: Please review CS-0000029 for Juniper EX4300 Variant 19. Bring the containment path, current reproduction detail, and documentation updates.

arguments.description: Review the internal escalation for CS-0000029 and confirm the next actions for Juniper EX4300 Variant 19.

sub_task_list.user_prompt: CS-0000029, which is case 29 for account 2, contact 124, and product 151, needs case-to-knowledge reuse and closure preparation. First, update the case to in progress, make it high priority, assign it to 795, and mark it as escalated for breach risk. Next, ask the IT problem/change engineer to create a new high-priority software incident for caller USER_045, submitted through email and assigned to USER_045 in assignment group GROUP_002, using the short description Internal escalation for CS-0000029 on Juniper EX4300 Variant 19. Also have the engineer create a change with the short description Containment plan for CS-0000029 on Juniper EX4300 Variant 19, in assess status, with medium impact, medium risk, and high priority. Then ask the collaboration operations specialist to send an email from olivia.chen@techcorp.com to carlos.mendez@techcorp.com, nina.patel@techcorp.com, and priya.nair@techcorp.com with the subject CS-0000029 escalation review, and to create a meeting titled CS-0000029 escalation review on the alice-primary calendar from 2026-05-15 14:30:00+08:00 to 2026-05-15 15:00:00+08:00. Finally, ask the knowledge base maintenance specialist to update CSM knowledge article 226 titled Juniper EX4300 Variant 19 remediation steps so that it is published, internally visible, associated with product 151, and owned by 795, then link it to case 29 as suggested.
